CADTransitionCommand.Title: CAD Transition to 3DExperience
CADTransitionCommand.ShortHelp: Convert 3DExperience content with CAD format into 3DExperience native data.
CADTransitionCommand.LongHelp: With CAD Transition, you can convert the selected 3DExperience content with CAD format. With the provided options you can customize how the data should be migrated.
